about:
I am a final-year Information Technology student passionate about mobile application development with Flutter. I enjoy building practical applications that combine clean UI with efficient backend integration.

Through personal and team projects, I have developed Flutter apps integrated with backend services such as ASP.NET Core, Django, and FastAPI. I have hands-on experience with state management, REST API integration, database design, and modern development tools like Git and CI/CD.

I am passionate about writing clean, maintainable code and continuously improving my problem-solving skills. My goal is to become a professional Mobile Developer and eventually grow into a Fullstack Mobile Developer capable of building complete mobile systems from client to server.
